roles.core: central bot, finance, licenses, central APIs, D1 authority and instant GitHub update checks
roles.edge: all web pages, reseller bots, customer miniapps and reseller management
roles.processor: scheduled reseller automation, retry queue and background jobs; Telegram webhooks are processed directly by Edge

fixes: remove Python Helper from the synchronous Telegram /start path
use deterministic local dashboard insight for immediate bot home rendering
cap optional Python Helper insight requests at 350 milliseconds and abort on timeout
run required-channel membership probes in parallel with a per-probe timeout
release channel announcement contains only version 2.9.7 changes
